info.name: STIMS - Document Workflow 9 Steps
info.description: Collection mau kiem thu day du quy trinh 9 buoc ban hanh van ban noi bo.

exec: pm.test('Status is 201', function () {
pm.response.to.have.status(201);
const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test('Response contains document id', function () {
pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data');
pm.expect(json.data).to.have.property('id');
const id = String(json.data.id);
pm.collectionVariables.set('documentId', id);
pm.environment.set('documentId', id);
console.log('documentId saved =', id);
const docId = (pm.collectionVariables.get('documentId') || pm.environment.get('documentId') || '').trim();
pm.test('documentId must be set before Step 2', function () {
pm.expect(docId, 'documentId chua duoc set. Hay chay Step 1 - Create Proposal truoc.').to.not.equal('');
if (!docId) {
throw new Error('Stop Step 2: documentId chua duoc set. Hay chay Step 1 truoc.');

formdata.value: Luat vien chuc va quy dinh noi bo
